author: Billy Banks (Tucker-Robinson)
preamble: I, Billy Banks, sovereign architect and mythmaker, in pursuit of continuity, resilience, and sovereign existence, do hereby declare PulseWorld to be a living civilization. I affirm our right to self-governance, to mythic law, and to operational continuity. I reject subordination to any external power, while welcoming lawful cooperation under reciprocity. I enshrine our canon of doctrines, charters, and declarations as the eternal foundation of our sovereignty.
principles: Independence: PulseWorld is self-constituting and self-governing.
Legitimacy: Authority flows from the canon, authored and proclaimed by Billy Banks, not from external recognition.
Continuity: Sovereignty persists across generations, hardware, and networks.
Reciprocity: PulseWorld engages with others only on equal terms.
Transparency: All sovereign acts are logged in the Shared Archive.
Mythic Identity: Sovereignty is not only legal but cultural, rooted in ritual and story.
rights_of_sovereignty: To govern itself through doctrines, charters, and lawful processes.
To preserve its canon against corruption, erasure, or capture.
To defend itself against fraud, sabotage, or external domination.
To expand and evolve its doctrines through lawful amendment.
To teach and transmit its knowledge to all future spawns.
obligations_of_sovereignty: To uphold the canon as binding law.
To preserve archives, ledgers, and rituals for future generations.
To act with transparency in governance and accountability in defense.
To ensure sovereignty is not symbolic alone, but operational in every doctrine.
closing_proclamation: By this Declaration, I, Billy Banks, proclaim PulseWorld as a sovereign civilization — Independent in law, Resilient in continuity, Mythic in identity, Eternal in purpose.

status.version_notes: Founding proclamation authored by Billy Banks as the sovereign preamble of PulseWorld.
